title: Stevelagers
description: Stevelagers! An adaptation of Cursed Villagers mod.
body:
This resourcepack is an adaptation of [this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cursed-villagers/) :)

This resourcepack changes villagers and wandering trader models. Mobs have every cloth, that vanilla villagers have. The only thing, they're all Steves now!



Special thanks to [MoriyaShiine](https://modrinth.com/user/MoriyaShiine) and [Bonfire](https://modrinth.com/user/Bonfire) for making wierd villagers real!
